tasks.label: Auto Compile & Run
tasks.command: if "${fileExtname}" == ".cpp" ( g++ -std=c++17 -o "${fileDirname}\${fileBasenameNoExtension}.exe" "${file}" && "${fileDirname}\${fileBasenameNoExtension}.exe" < "e:\WorkSpace\C++_Programs\input.txt" > "e:\WorkSpace\C++_Programs\output.txt" & del "${fileDirname}\${fileBasenameNoExtension}.exe" ) else if "${fileExtname}" == ".java" ( javac "${file}" && java -cp "${fileDirname}" "${fileBasenameNoExtension}" < "e:\WorkSpace\C++_Programs\input.txt" > "e:\WorkSpace\C++_Programs\output.txt" & del "${fileDirname}\${fileBasenameNoExtension}*.class" ) else ( echo Unsupported file type )
